fn find_matching(items: &[Item], pattern: &str) -> Option<Item> {
    for item in items {
        let cloned = item.clone();
        if cloned.name.contains(pattern) {
            return Some(cloned);
        }
    }
    None
}

fn accumulate_tags(entries: &[Entry]) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut tags = Vec::new();
    for entry in entries {
        let name = entry.name.clone();
        tags.push(name);
    }
    tags
}

fn transform_values(values: &[Value]) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for value in values {
        let s = value.to_string();
        let cloned = s.clone();
        results.push(cloned);
    }
    results
}

struct Item { name: String }
struct Entry { name: String }
struct Value;
impl Value { fn to_string(&self) -> String { todo!() } }
